---
title: "CV"
---

## Curriculum Vitae

### Education

- PhD, Mechanical Engineering, Purdue University, 2027 (Expected)
- Master of Technology, IIT Bombay, 2022
- Bachelor of Technology, IIT Bombay, 2022

<!-- ### Academic Positions

- Role, Department or Lab, Dates

### Awards and Honors

- Award name, Year

### Teaching

- Course or teaching role, Term

### Service

- Reviewer, committee, or outreach activity -->
